basic_details.job_title: Calcutta High Court Software Developers Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The latest Calcutta High Court (CHC) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Software Developers posts! Published on 16th April 2026 at calcuttahighcourt.gov.in, this new recruitment drive offers 2 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the 18 to 40 years age group and possessing a 1st Class MCA, 1st Class M.Sc. in IT/Computer Science, or 1st Class B.E./B. Tech in IT/Computer Science can apply offline from 16th April 2026 to 20th May 2026. Find all details about the CHC Software Developers new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, offline form, and notification PDF here.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age as on 01-01-2026

qualification.education_qualification: 1st Class MCA or 1st Class M.Sc. in IT/Computer Science or 1st Class B.E. in IT/Computer Science or 1st Class B. Tech in IT/Computer Science with skill in software design, development, documentation and Implementation.
qualification.details: 1st Class MCA or 1st Class M.Sc. in IT/Computer Science or 1st Class B.E. in IT/Computer Science or 1st Class B. Tech in IT/Computer Science with skill in software design, development, documentation and Implementation.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Calcutta High Court Software Developers Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.calcuttahighcourt.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Calcutta High Court Software Developers recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Calcutta High Court Software Developers recruitment is 20-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Software Developers?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the post of Software Developers in the Calcutta High Court.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Software Developer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a 1st Class MCA or 1st Class M.Sc. in IT/Computer Science or 1st Class B.E. or B. Tech in IT/Computer Science with relevant software development skills.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is between 18 years and 40 years, as of 01-01-2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Software Developer position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 33,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Software Developers role?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve a Viva-voce/Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 600/-.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Calcutta High Court.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of the Calcutta High Court?
faq.answer: The official website of the Calcutta High Court is www.calcuttahighcourt.gov.in.
